name: Amphastar Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
business: The company manufactures and sells over 25 prescription pharmaceutical products and one OTC product, focusing on injectable, inhalation, and intranasal drugs, as well as active pharmaceutical ingredients. Major products include BAQSIMI, Primatene MIST, glucagon, epinephrine, and lidocaine, sold primarily to institutional customers like hospitals, clinics, and retail pharmacies through group purchasing organizations and distributors.

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company focusing on developing, manufacturing, and commercializing technically challenging generic and proprietary injectable, inhalation, and intranasal products, as well as active pharmaceutical ingredient, or API products.

catalysts.event: Planned launch of Ipratropium Bromide HFA inhalation aerosol in early second quarter of 2026
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the FDA approved our Ipratropium Bromide HFA inhalation aerosol, 17 mcg/actuation, which we plan to launch early in the second quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. injectable drug market in 2025 was over $480 billion, with $7 billion targeted by the company.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on a December 2025 IQVIA National Sales Perspective Report, the U.S. injectable drug market in 2025 was over $480 billion.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. inhalation drug market in 2025 was approximately $27 billion, with $1.1 billion targeted by the company.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on a December 2025 IQVIA National Sales Perspective Report, the U.S. inhalation drug market in 2025 was approximately $27 billion.
